title: LinkedIn Insight Tag Conversions API provider config
description: Configuration shape for a LinkedIn Insight Tag Conversions API integration.

conversion_urn.description: LinkedIn Conversion URN. Format: urn:lla:llaPartnerConversion:{id}. One URN per conversion type (LinkedIn treats each event_type as a separate conversion).

access_token.description: OAuth2 Bearer token for the LinkedIn Ads API. Encrypted at rest. Refreshed via the refresh_token when available.

refresh_token.description: OAuth2 refresh token. When present, expired access_tokens are auto-refreshed. Encrypted at rest.

conversion_urn_map.description: Optional per-event-type override of conversion_urn. When present, keys are MarketingEventType values.

account_id.description: Optional LinkedIn Ads account ID for account-specific attribution. Required only for accounts with multiple conversion trackers.

timeout_seconds.description: LinkedIn's API is slower than Meta/Google — 20s default.
